nodes.context: Italian Camorra clan operating in Naples and surrounding areas, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, money laundering.

edges.evidence_quote: The Di Lauro clan is an Italian crime clan, part of the Camorra in Naples.
edges.context: Di Lauro clan is a constituent part of the Camorra.

edges.evidence_quote: The Italian Direzione Distrettuale Antimafia first investigated the clan in 2002, which led to the imprisonment of its most influential members, including Abbinante clan boss Raffaele 'Papale e Marano' Abbinante, who was aligned with Di Lauro.
edges.context: Abbinante clan boss was aligned with Di Lauro.

edges.evidence_quote: Their connections with other clans were strengthened in the Secondigliano Alliance.
edges.context: Di Lauro clan strengthened connections within the Secondigliano Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Some of Di Lauro's former allies formed a rival alliance (Scissionisti di Secondigliano) and started a bloody power struggle in 2004 known as the Scampia feud.
edges.context: Scissionisti di Secondigliano formed from former Di Lauro allies and fought a power struggle.

edges.evidence_quote: The Di Lauro clan also has ties to the Sacra Corona Unita and Ciro Contini, a member of the Contini Clan, regarding drug trafficking.
edges.context: Di Lauro clan has ties to Sacra Corona Unita for drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: The Di Lauro clan also has ties to the Sacra Corona Unita and Ciro Contini, a member of the Contini Clan, regarding drug trafficking.
edges.context: Di Lauro clan has ties to Contini clan for drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: The organization maintained stable connections with Albanian criminal groups, which supplied cocaine and hashish imported from abroad.
edges.context: Di Lauro clan maintained stable connections with Albanian criminal groups for drug supply.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Secondigliano Alliance Contini clan, Licciardi clan, Mallardo clan, Sacra Corona Unita, D'Alessandro clan, Giuliano clan (defunct), Albanian mafia
edges.context: Licciardi clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Secondigliano Alliance Contini clan, Licciardi clan, Mallardo clan, Sacra Corona Unita, D'Alessandro clan, Giuliano clan (defunct), Albanian mafia
edges.context: Mallardo clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.

edges.context: D'Alessandro clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.

edges.context: Giuliano clan is listed as a defunct ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Scissionisti di Secondigliano, Ruocco clan, Abbinante clan, Sacco-Bocchetti clan
edges.context: Ruocco clan is listed as a rival in the infobox.
